_meta.keyKnowledge: We develop our media production skills by experimenting with images, sounds, text and interactive elements.

_source.w: We develop our media production skills by experimenting with images, sounds, text and interactive elements.
y: Experimenting with media tools helps us discover new creative possibilities.
Building technical skills gives us more control over how our work looks and sounds.
Understanding how media elements work together is essential in today's world.
eg: We ask 'How can I represent meaning using images and text together?' while working.
We experiment with camera angles, framing and movement to create different effects.
We explore how sound design — music, effects, silence — shapes the audience's experience.
We manipulate digital images to change their mood, meaning or visual impact.
We experiment with editing techniques like cuts, transitions and pacing.
We explore how interactive elements can engage an audience in new ways.
